# Pull Request

## Type of Change

- [ ] New program addition
- [ ] Update to existing program (amount, eligibility, URL)
- [ ] Correction (typo, broken link)
- [ ] Removal (program ended or no longer qualifies)
- [ ] Documentation improvement

## Program Name

<!-- If applicable -->

## Source Verification

<!-- Link to the provider's own page confirming current terms. Dated 2026 preferred. -->

- Source URL:
- Date accessed:

## Summary of Changes

<!-- Brief description. What changed and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have verified the information against the provider's own documentation, not a third-party aggregator.
- [ ] I have not included affiliate or referral links.
- [ ] Credit amount and eligibility match the provider's current published terms.
- [ ] Formatting matches existing entries (inline code for URLs, no marketing language).
- [ ] If adding a new program, it meets the $1,000+ minimum or has a clear strategic rationale.
